title: SQLancer distinct aggregate with error on group by constant
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10,2), group_id INT);
SELECT MIN(DISTINCT value) FROM test_table WHERE group_id = 1 GROUP BY group_id;
CREATE TABLE another_table (a VARCHAR(50), b INT);
INSERT INTO another_table (a, b) VALUES ('test', 1), ('example', NULL), (NULL, 2);
SELECT * FROM another_table WHERE b IS NULL;
key_bug_features: DISTINCT aggregate with GROUP BY constant
